core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/execu.general_idea: Add Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and setters.
Introduce a ThreadLocal to track workflow entry points for proper context cleanup.
Rename and restructure public execute methods to support starting from specific nodes and remove deprecated resource type parameters.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/execu.human_impl: public ResourceTank executeFrom(final GraphContext graphContext, final String graphName, final String startNode, final boolean autoRecord)

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/execu.general_idea: Update reboot method signature to declare InterruptedException, allowing proper thread interruption handling.
Decompose the monolithic start method into smaller, single-responsibility methods for graph deduction, preparation, execution, and cleanup.
Implement logic to create child workflows when a workflow is triggered within an already running workflow context.
Allow workflows to start execution from a specific node ID instead of always starting from the graph's default start node.
Add a check to prevent infinite loops by detecting if the next execution node is the same as the previous one.
Move node traversal and state switching logic to a helper class and injectable switcher interface.
Simplify suspend handling by using node intervals directly and removing complex async task setup for simple waits.
Remove the legacy async task setup logic that used FutureTask and Callable, likely replaced by the new traversal helper.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/execu.human_impl: // Removed setUpAsyncTasks method and related imports (Callable, FutureTask)

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/execu.general_idea: Refactor cleanup logic to properly handle thread-local entrance tags and child workflow relationships.
